| ~/Desktop/landon/ai_final/LeCoder-cgpu-CLI | 200+ uncommitted file modifications; pull/push blocked by deadlock |

Issue: Multiple git repositories are hitting "Resource deadlock avoided" and "mmap failed" errors — typically caused by:
- Git index lock files stuck from previous operations
- Antivirus/OneDrive/Google Drive holding file handles
- Concurrent git processes competing for resources

Recommendation: Close any IDE/editor windows touching these repos, then try running:
  rm -f */.git/index.lock
  git gc --aggressive

The OpenClaw workspace itself is clean and current; the broader sync could not complete due to the lock conflicts above.
